title: Water UK says AI data centre plans ignore where the water comes from
summary: Britain wants to triple its data centre capacity by 2030. Data centres in England use about 6.6 million litres of drinking water a day, and Water UK expects that to reach 19.8 million litres if capacity triples as planned.
